headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Moderna, Raises Price Target to $67
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Salveen Richter   maintains Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $49 to $67.
